backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing student management system with courses, profiles, attendance, test scores, and study materials using authorization mixins and blob storage for file uploads.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented study materials management features for both admin and student roles with associated test IDs and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON summary of frontend files describing admin pages for courses/attendance/test scores/materials, student materials page, layout with navigation, and React Query hooks for backend operations.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes defining colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Cognify application with root div and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component defining TanStack Router configuration with routes for student pages, admin pages, authentication, and profile setup with Layout wrapper and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying a shield alert icon and message for unauthorized users attempting to access admin-only pages.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Application layout component with responsive header, navigation menu for students/admins, authentication button, mobile menu toggle, and footer displaying phone number and branding.
frontend/src/components/OwnerAccessGuide: A collapsible card component that provides a step-by-step guide for administrators to access Cognify using Internet Identity authentication, including explanations of Internet Identity and first-time admin setup instructions.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileSetup: A form component that prompts new users to enter their name and saves their profile with a 'student' role using the useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors, and initializes access control with an optional admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and integration with the Internet Computer's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, student profiles, courses, attendance, test scores, study materials, and admin management with toast notifications for success/error feedback.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm amber/orange color palette for light and dark themes, plus utility classes for success and warning states.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up the React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/AdminAttendancePage.t: Admin page for marking student attendance by course and date. Currently incomplete as it cannot retrieve student principal IDs needed for the backend mutation.
frontend/src/pages/AdminCoursesPage.tsx: Admin page for managing courses with add and edit dialogs. Displays courses in a table with ID, name, description, and class level fields.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard overview page displaying total students and courses statistics with navigation links to management pages. Features a hero section with gradient background.
frontend/src/pages/AdminMaterialsPage.ts: Admin page for uploading and managing study materials with file upload (max 10MB), course/class filtering, and progress tracking. Uses ExternalBlob for file handling with upload progress callbacks.
frontend/src/pages/AdminSettingsPage.tsx: Admin settings page for managing administrator access, displaying current admin principal ID with copy functionality, and adding new admins by principal ID.
frontend/src/pages/AdminSetupPage.tsx: Admin setup page that allows users to log in with Internet Identity and add their principal ID as an admin, with copy-to-clipboard functionality and redirect to dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/AdminStudentDetailPag: Displays detailed student profile information including attendance percentage, average test scores, and enrolled courses, with admin access control and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/AdminStudentsPage.tsx: Admin page for viewing and managing all students with search and class-level filtering capabilities, displaying students in a table format.
frontend/src/pages/AdminTestScoresPage.t: Admin form for recording student test scores by selecting student, course, and entering score values, though currently has a limitation accessing student principal IDs.
frontend/src/pages/AttendancePage.tsx: Student-facing page that displays personal attendance records with overall statistics, present/absent day counts, and per-course breakdown in a table format.
frontend/src/pages/CoursesPage.tsx: Displays available courses filtered by student's class level with enrollment functionality. Shows authentication guards, loading states, and course cards with enroll/enrolled status.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section, owner access guide for unauthenticated users, and features section highlighting Cognify's educational approach. Conditionally renders registration or course navigation based on authentication status.
frontend/src/pages/MaterialsPage.tsx: Displays study materials filtered by student's enrolled courses and class level with download functionality. Includes authentication checks and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Student registration form collecting student details, contact info, and parent contact with validation for email and phone formats. Submits registration and navigates to home on success.
frontend/src/pages/StudentProfilePage.ts: Student profile view with edit mode for updating personal information, contact details, and parent contact. Displays enrolled courses and includes form validation for email and phone fields.
frontend/src/pages/TestResultsPage.tsx: React page component that displays a student's test results with overall performance statistics, course-wise breakdowns, and a detailed table of individual test scores with percentage-based badges.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings for typography, animations, and design tokens for a student management platform UI.
project_state.json: Project metadata file documenting the Cognify coaching institute student management platform, including architectural notes and completed features like registration, enrollment, attendance tracking, test results, and admin dashboard.
